texto: The tree witches kept to themselves, a self-sufficient coven specializing in certain skills. She'd ventured to that different world to hear the unique groups, especially to watch the guitarist with hair as black as midnight.

texto: In decades past, the three clans of the island - tree witches, gargoyles, and wolves, had cloaked their land with many layers of protection. Their combined magic had created such a powerful force it had remained undetected by human technology. When a feud erupted between the witches and gargoyles twenty-five years ago it led to a division of land. Without reinforcements from the clans' combined magic, the protection seeped away.
